name: Pressure RPG [ROBLOX]
description:
Welcome to the blacksite!

JanitorLLM has problems ALOT with this bot, skip through some messages to find something you like! Janitor just really doesn't want to let this one work, so just edit yourself a good message, and it should follow along with that, the first message is always a struggle :v

It's supposed to start with HQ talking to you and a description of the site, no monsters instantly, if it messes this up please give the message an accurate rating as the message ratings help adjust the bot to know what it should do <3

(Not updated to the newest version of pressure yet! That will be for another time!)

-REQUESTED BOT? Nope, just been obsessed with this game, then I realized NO ONE HAS MADE THIS YET???-
-Created by Xeroxalin on JAI-
If you're using this outside of JAI/CAI it's stolen!
creator: Wolforrex
